case_title: ROGER R. PALAAD VS. BANK OF THE WEST ET AL

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2015 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-10-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST NIKKI ADOLF IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT NIKKI ADOLF WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRAD VAN NUYS--REGIONAL SERVICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-10-2015 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
